phonetic: 藢d蕭i藧蓹蕣str蓹藞ti藧d蕭瑟k
examples: The Ukrainian crisis is quickly becoming a geostrategic conflict.
Pakistan became a country of paramount geostrategic importance to the United States.
The forming of Sino Europe geostrategic relationship pattern had its special historical process.
Whatever circumstance springs up is accounted for, even when it seems to contradict geostrategic logic.
History shows that many great geostrategic turning points are hardly recognized as such at the time.
